description:
# 1.0.0 (2026-05-14)


### Bug Fixes

* add YouTube Music proxy diagnostics ([f677567](https://github.com/kontsevoye/emorphe-patches/commit/f6775673ea4d52a2647fe82939db84e5a1911a4d))
* align proxy runtime settings ([aa711a9](https://github.com/kontsevoye/emorphe-patches/commit/aa711a94284bfd65cad3c3d254ea041a7adc92fc))
* open editable EMorphe settings ([1bcc42f](https://github.com/kontsevoye/emorphe-patches/commit/1bcc42fb7c09ceac0ec7a9831c2b2e45a1353197))
* route YouTube Music media stack via HTTP proxy ([7189321](https://github.com/kontsevoye/emorphe-patches/commit/71893216cf1daed8e12a5f624ac1902cdce9b2d3))
* use nested EMorphe preference screens ([a7118a2](https://github.com/kontsevoye/emorphe-patches/commit/a7118a2f234509a0720e9a4d76c36a37a827c18a))
* use self-contained proxy text preferences ([5c815d4](https://github.com/kontsevoye/emorphe-patches/commit/5c815d4281ec684e0286bcee597b142c8887326d))


### Features

* add runtime proxy settings ([211820c](https://github.com/kontsevoye/emorphe-patches/commit/211820c78bdada80609f796a0a35be61a8801108))
* add YouTube Music proxy patch ([#1](https://github.com/kontsevoye/emorphe-patches/issues/1)) ([78e6f77](https://github.com/kontsevoye/emorphe-patches/commit/78e6f779c920d24b06766541601ade6374555aba))
